measurements.claim: The hyphal context benchmark CLI emits HYPHAL_CONTEXT_FIXTURE_MATCH with equal required evidence-class recovery, equal guardrail recovery, and fewer estimated prompt tokens than the full-context route.
The publication copy states the benchmark as one deterministic fixture and does not claim universal route superiority or measured model answer quality.
The benchmark receipt carries refs, hashes, coverage, and retrieval reasons without embedding raw source bodies or raw context.
